overall.description: Nighttime first-person walk along a wet city sidewalk beside Cedars-Sinai Medical Center in a game engine environment (GTA V). The camera passes a female pedestrian while moving through an urban downtown area with modern architecture, palm trees, and illuminated skyscrapers in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: medical center entrance sidewalk with illuminated directory

events.description: medical center directory sign passes out of view to the left as camera moves forward
pedestrian passes closely by on the left side, moving in opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk past the medical center entrance

notable_agents.action: woman in black dress walking toward the camera along the sidewalk

entered.detail: illuminated hospital directory with red, orange, and blue panels listing departments like Emergency and Outpatient Surgery
modern multi-story medical building with concrete facade and covered entrance walkway
tall palm trees lining the edge of the sidewalk between walkway and street
illuminated downtown skyscrapers visible in the distance beyond the medical center

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the Cedars-Sinai Medical Center entrance, showing an illuminated directory sign on the left. The camera walks forward along the wet concrete sidewalk as a female pedestrian in dark clothing approaches from the distance and passes by on the left. Palm trees line the right side of the path, and the glowing city skyline is visible ahead between the buildings.

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk away from the medical center entrance, moving deeper into the downtown area

segments.scene_description: After the pedestrian passes, the camera continues walking along the wet sidewalk with the medical center building now closer on the left. The palm trees on the right are now nearer, and the view opens up to show more of the street and distant traffic. The scene maintains the nighttime urban atmosphere with artificial lighting reflecting off the damp pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a wet urban sidewalk that transitions from the immediate entrance of a medical center toward a wider view of the nighttime city. It begins at the Cedars-Sinai Medical Center entrance, passing an illuminated directory sign as a female pedestrian in dark clothing approaches and walks past on the left. As the camera moves forward, the wet concrete reflects the surrounding artificial lights while palm trees line the right side of the path. The scene then opens up, moving closer to the medical center building on the left and the palm trees on the right, which reveals more of the street and distant traffic. Finally, the perspective expands to showcase the glowing city skyline and illuminated skyscrapers towering in the distance under the dark night sky.
